description: GLOBAL Renovate policy (RENOVATE_CONFIG_FILE in .github/workflows/renovate.yaml) — the supply-chain baseline enforced on EVERY repo the homelab-renovate App autodiscovers. Per-repo renovate.json only chooses automerge preferences on top of this. Implements the S2C2F (consumer) leg of docs/slsa.md.

vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security fixes are the exception to the cooldown — get them in fast (CI still gates). Labelled `automerge` so the reviewer reflex approves them; auto-merged so exposure is minimal.
